title: Lenticular Custom Apparel for Influencers
summary:
Revenue: $45/item (cost $10), $150 min order; upsell "influencer campaign" for $300.
- **Time to first $**: 3 days (list on Fiverr + target influencers).
- **First action**: Run Serper for "holographic influencer apparel," list on Fiverr with "influencer campaign" bundle.
- **Risk**: Low influencer engagement (mitigated by targeting nano-influencers with 1k-10k followers).
Next step: Run Serper for "holographic influencer apparel," list on Fiverr with "influencer campaign" bundle.
